description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Utopia News Pro (UNP) 1.1.3 and 1.1.4 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) the sitetitle parameter in header.php and (2) the version and (3) query_count parameters in footer.php.
